## ADHD/Executive Function {#sec-adhd}

```{r}
#| label: setup-adhd
#| include: false
#| cache: true

# Load required packages
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(gt)
  library(gtExtras)
  library(neuro2)
})

# Define domains
domains <- "ADHD/Executive Function"

# Load and process data
processor <- DomainProcessorR6$new(
  domains = domains,
  pheno = "adhd",
  input_file = "data/neurobehav.parquet"
)

processor$load_data()
processor$filter_by_domain()
processor$select_columns()

# Main data object
adhd_data1 <- processor$data |> dplyr::filter(test != "frsbe_observer")
adhd_data2 <- processor$data |> dplyr::filter(test == "frsbe_observer")
```

### SELF-REPORT

{{< include _02-09_adhd_text.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| label: text-adhd
#| cache: true
#| include: false

# Generate text using R6 class
if (nrow(adhd_data1) > 0) {
  results_processor <- NeuropsychResultsR6$new(
    data = adhd_data1,
    file = "_02-09_adhd_text.qmd"
  )
  results_processor$process()
}
```

```{r}
#| label: qtbl-adhd
#| include: false
#| eval: true

if (nrow(adhd_data1) > 0) {
  # Generate table
  table_adhd <- TableGTR6$new(
    data = adhd_data1,
    pheno = "adhd",
    table_name = "table_adhd",
    vertical_padding = 0
  )
  tbl <- table_adhd$build_table()
  table_adhd$save_table(tbl, dir = here::here("figs"))
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-adhd-subdomain
#| include: false
#| eval: true

adhd_data1 <- adhd_data1 |> dplyr::filter(test != "pai")

if (nrow(adhd_data1) > 0) {
  # Generate subdomain figure
  if (all(c("z_mean_subdomain", "subdomain") %in% names(adhd_data1))) {
    # Remove NA values for plotting
    data_subdomain <- adhd_data1[
      !is.na(adhd_data1$z_mean_subdomain) & !is.na(adhd_data1$subdomain),
    ]

    if (nrow(data_subdomain) > 0) {
      fig_path <- here::here("figs", "fig_adhd_subdomain")

      # Create plot object
      dotplot_subdomain <- DotplotR6$new(
        data = data_subdomain,
        x = "z_mean_subdomain",
        y = "subdomain"
      )

      # Save as PNG
      dotplot_subdomain$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".png")
      dotplot_subdomain$create_plot()

      # Save as PDF
      dotplot_subdomain$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".pdf")
      dotplot_subdomain$create_plot()

      # Save original SVG for compatibility
      dotplot_subdomain$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".svg")
      dotplot_subdomain$create_plot()
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-adhd-narrow
#| include: false
#| eval: true

if (nrow(adhd_data1) > 0) {
  # Generate narrow figure
  if (all(c("z_mean_narrow", "narrow") %in% names(adhd_data1))) {
    # Remove NA values for plotting
    data_narrow <- adhd_data1[
      !is.na(adhd_data1$z_mean_narrow) & !is.na(adhd_data1$narrow),
    ]

    if (nrow(data_narrow) > 0) {
      fig_path <- here::here("figs", "fig_adhd_narrow")

      # Create plot object
      dotplot_narrow <- DotplotR6$new(
        data = data_narrow,
        x = "z_mean_narrow",
        y = "narrow"
      )

      # Save as PNG
      dotplot_narrow$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".png")
      dotplot_narrow$create_plot()

      # Save as PDF
      dotplot_narrow$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".pdf")
      dotplot_narrow$create_plot()

      # Save original SVG for compatibility
      dotplot_narrow$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".svg")
      dotplot_narrow$create_plot()
    }
  }
}

# Ensure plot title exists
plot_title_adhd <- "ADHD symptoms impact attention, hyperactivity, and impulsivity across settings."

# Try to load custom title from sysdata.rda
sysdata_path <- here::here("R", "sysdata.rda")
if (file.exists(sysdata_path)) {
  sysdata_env <- new.env()
  load(sysdata_path, envir = sysdata_env)
  custom_title_name <- paste0("plot_title_", "adhd")
  if (exists(custom_title_name, envir = sysdata_env)) {
    plot_title_adhd <- get(custom_title_name, envir = sysdata_env)
  }
}
```

```{=typst}
// Define a function to create a domain with a title, a table, and a figure
#let domain(title: none, file_qtbl, file_fig) = {
  let font = (font: "Roboto Slab", size: 0.7em)
  set text(..font)

  // Make all figure labels (Table X:, Figure X:) bold
  show figure.caption: it => {
    context {
      let supplement = it.supplement
      let counter = it.counter.display(it.numbering)
      block[*#supplement #counter:* #it.body]
    }
  }

  pad(top: 0.5em)[]
  grid(
    columns: (50%, 50%),
    gutter: 8pt,
    figure(
      [#image(file_qtbl)],
      caption: figure.caption(position: top, [#title]),
      kind: "qtbl",
      supplement: [*Table*],
    ),
    figure(
      [#image(file_fig, width: auto)],
      caption: figure.caption(
        position: bottom,
        [`{r} plot_title_adhd`],
      ),
      placement: none,
      kind: "image",
      supplement: [*Figure*],
      gap: 0.5em,
    ),
  )
}
```

```{=typst}
// Define the title of the domain
#let title = "ADHD/Executive Function"

// Define the file name of the table
#let file_qtbl = "figs/table_adhd.png"

// Define the file name of the figure
#let file_fig = "figs/fig_adhd_subdomain.svg"

// The title is appended with ' Scores'
#domain(title: [#title Scores], file_qtbl, file_fig)
```

```{=typst}
// Define the title of the domain
#let title = "ADHD"

// Define the file name of the table
#let file_qtbl = "figs/table_adhd.png"

// Define the file name of the figure
#let file_fig = "figs/fig_adhd_narrow.svg"

// The title is appended with ' Scores'
#domain(title: [#title Scores], file_qtbl, file_fig)
```

### OBSERVER RATINGS

{{< include _02-09_adhd_text_observer.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| label: text-adhd-observer
#| include: false

# Generate text using R6 class
if (nrow(adhd_data2) > 0) {
  results_processor <- NeuropsychResultsR6$new(
    data = adhd_data2,
    file = "_02-09_adhd_text_observer.qmd"
  )
  results_processor$process()
}
```

```{r}
#| label: qtbl-adhd-observer
#| include: false

if (nrow(adhd_data2) > 0) {
  # Generate table
  table_adhd <- TableGTR6$new(
    data = adhd_data2,
    pheno = "adhd",
    table_name = "table_adhd_observer",
    vertical_padding = 0
  )
  tbl <- table_adhd$build_table()
  table_adhd$save_table(tbl, dir = here::here("figs"))
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-adhd-subdomain-observer
#| include: false
#| eval: true

if (nrow(adhd_data2) > 0) {
  # Generate subdomain figure
  if (all(c("z_mean_subdomain", "subdomain") %in% names(adhd_data2))) {
    # Remove NA values for plotting
    data_subdomain <- adhd_data2[
      !is.na(adhd_data2$z_mean_subdomain) & !is.na(adhd_data2$subdomain),
    ]

    if (nrow(data_subdomain) > 0) {
      fig_path <- here::here("figs", "fig_adhd_subdomain_observer")

      # Create plot object
      dotplot_subdomain <- DotplotR6$new(
        data = data_subdomain,
        x = "z_mean_subdomain",
        y = "subdomain"
      )

      # Save as PNG
      dotplot_subdomain$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".png")
      dotplot_subdomain$create_plot()

      # Save as PDF
      dotplot_subdomain$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".pdf")
      dotplot_subdomain$create_plot()

      # Save original SVG for compatibility
      dotplot_subdomain$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".svg")
      dotplot_subdomain$create_plot()
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-adhd-narrow-observer
#| include: false
#| eval: true

if (nrow(adhd_data2) > 0) {
  # Generate subdomain figure
  if (all(c("z_mean_narrow", "narrow") %in% names(adhd_data2))) {
    # Remove NA values for plotting
    data_narrow <- adhd_data2[
      !is.na(adhd_data2$z_mean_narrow) & !is.na(adhd_data2$narrow),
    ]

    if (nrow(data_narrow) > 0) {
      fig_path <- here::here("figs", "fig_adhd_narrow_observer")

      # Create plot object
      dotplot_narrow <- DotplotR6$new(
        data = data_narrow,
        x = "z_mean_narrow",
        y = "narrow"
      )

      # Save as PNG
      dotplot_narrow$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".png")
      dotplot_narrow$create_plot()

      # Save as PDF
      dotplot_narrow$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".pdf")
      dotplot_narrow$create_plot()

      # Save original SVG for compatibility
      dotplot_narrow$filename <- paste0(fig_path, ".svg")
      dotplot_narrow$create_plot()
    }
  }
}

# Ensure plot title exists
plot_title_adhd <- "ADHD symptoms impact attention, hyperactivity, and impulsivity across settings. Observer ratings"

# Try to load custom title from sysdata.rda
sysdata_path <- here::here("R", "sysdata.rda")
if (file.exists(sysdata_path)) {
  sysdata_env <- new.env()
  load(sysdata_path, envir = sysdata_env)
  custom_title_name <- paste0("plot_title_", "adhd")
  if (exists(custom_title_name, envir = sysdata_env)) {
    plot_title_adhd <- get(custom_title_name, envir = sysdata_env)
  }
}
```

```{=typst}
// Define a function to create a domain with a title, a table, and a figure
#let domain(title: none, file_qtbl, file_fig) = {
  let font = (font: "Roboto Slab", size: 0.7em)
  set text(..font)

  // Make all figure labels (Table X:, Figure X:) bold
  show figure.caption: it => {
    context {
      let supplement = it.supplement
      let counter = it.counter.display(it.numbering)
      block[*#supplement #counter:* #it.body]
    }
  }

  pad(top: 0.5em)[]
  grid(
    columns: (50%, 50%),
    gutter: 8pt,
    figure(
      [#image(file_qtbl)],
      caption: figure.caption(position: top, [#title]),
      kind: "qtbl",
      supplement: [*Table*],
    ),
    figure(
      [#image(file_fig, width: auto)],
      caption: figure.caption(
        position: bottom,
        [`{r} plot_title_adhd` Observer],
      ),
      placement: none,
      kind: "image",
      supplement: [*Figure*],
      gap: 0.5em,
    ),
  )
}
```

```{=typst}
// Define the title of the domain
#let title = "ADHD/Executive Function-Observer Ratings"

// Define the file name of the table
#let file_qtbl = "figs/table_adhd_observer.png"

// Define the file name of the figure
#let file_fig = "figs/fig_adhd_subdomain_observer.svg"

// The title is appended with ' Scores'
#domain(title: [#title Scores], file_qtbl, file_fig)
```


```{=typst}
// Define the title of the domain
#let title = "ADHD/Executive Function-Observer Ratings"

// Define the file name of the table
#let file_qtbl = "figs/table_adhd_observer.png"

// Define the file name of the figure
#let file_fig = "figs/fig_adhd_narrow_observer.svg"

// The title is appended with ' Scores'
#domain(title: [#title Scores], file_qtbl, file_fig)
```
